prereq.p: You need a Windows or macOS computer with internet access and administrator rights to install software.

step.cmd: Open your browser and go to code.visualstudio.com.
Click the large Download button. The site detects your operating system automatically.
Run the downloaded installer and follow the on-screen steps, accepting all default options.

info.note: On Windows, check the option Add to PATH if it appears during installation.

step.cmd: Launch VS Code from your desktop or Start Menu to confirm the installation succeeded.

result.p: VS Code opens to a Welcome tab. Your workspace is ready.
